children.label: C
children.text: preventing the decline of intact and healthy systems;
to establish a consensus set of national conservation strategies as a framework to guide future actions and investment by Fish Habitat Partnerships;

children.label: B
children.text: fostering the participation of local communities, especially young people in local communities, in conservation activities; and

children.label: C
children.text: raising public awareness of the role healthy fish habitat play in the quality of life and economic well-being of local communities;

children.label: A
children.text: to empower strategic conservation actions supported by broadly available scientific information; and

children.label: B
children.text: to integrate socioeconomic data in the analysis to improve the lives of humans in a manner consistent with fish habitat conservation goals; and

children.label: A
children.text: the conservation outcomes produced collectively by Fish Habitat Partnerships; and

children.label: B
children.text: new opportunities and voluntary approaches for conserving fish habitat.
